characters.name: Minor Characters
characters.description: There have been manyMinor Characterson Caillou. This a list of them.

characters.name: Allen (Alan)
characters.description: Allen (Alan)is a 5-year-old boy who lives in the same neighborhood area asCaillou. He is a playful and imaginative child, but has trouble learning how to do some things such as climbing and swinging because he hasDown syndrome. He went toCaillou's Playschoolto try it in "Caillou and the Dragon" and enjoyed his time there, but has not yet been seen in any other appearances to date.

characters.name: Caillou
characters.description: CaillouBackground informationFirst appearance(s)Caillou Makes CookiesLast appearance(s)You're Not Miss Martin!Feature filmsCaillou’s Holiday MovieTelevision programsCaillouDesignerChristine L’HeureuxVoiceBryn McAuley (Season 1)Jaclyn Linetsky † (Season 2-3)Annie Bovaird (Season 4-5)Claudia-Laurie Corbeil (French)Julia Haacke (German)Gaby Ugarte (Season 1-3) (Latin American Spanish)Circe Luna (2nd-4th Voice) (Latin American Spanish)Emilio Prado (5th Voice) (Latin American Spanish)Emma Tate (British English)Character informationFull nameCaillouPersonalityKind, caring, adventurous, helpful, imaginative, stubborn (formerly), happy-go-lucky, dreamy, inquisitive, well-behaved, insightful, playful, friendly, curious, sensitive, short-tempered (formerly), spoiled (formerly), misguided (formerly), average, annoying (formerly), bratty (formerly), adorable, lovable, whiny (formerly), exploratory, sweet, rude at times (especially in the earlier seasons)OccupationStudentAlignmentGood (debatable)HomeQuebec, CanadaSpeciesCaucasianGenderMaleSpeciesHumanAge(s)4RelativesGrandma(paternal grandmother)Grandpa(paternal grandfather)Unnamed maternal grandmotherUnnamed maternal grandfatherPartner(s)TinaParentsDoris(mother)Boris(father)SiblingsRosie(younger sister)Pet(s)Gilbert(cat)AlliesLeo(best friend)ClementineJasonSarahJefferyXavierEmmaAndreAndyDanielJimMarieLaylaMr. Hinkle(grandfather figure)AlexEnemiesLeo(formerly)Jim(formerly)Andy(formerly)Alex(formerly)LikesRosie, his parents, his grandparents, Tina, Leo, Clementine, his space rocket, Rexy (his toy dinosaur), riding his bike around the neighborhood with his friends, Jason, Jeffery, going to the park, Sara, spaghetti, birthday parties, Christmas, sharing, Xavier, Emma, Miss. Martin, playing in the sand, walking around the block by himself, Halloween, the old people at the senior citizen's center, pizza, cookiesDislikesRosie putting sand on his pants, Leo spilling juice on him, the dark, breaking his knee, Rosie taking his things, listening to others (formerly)StatusAlive, activeSourceCaillouis a 4-year-old boy who serves as the titular main protagonist of theTV seriesand books, all of the same name. He is presented as an inquisitive, friendly, adorable, lovable, curious, and adventurous young child who enjoys exploring the world around him. He's also intended to be a representation of a real preschooler. Created by child psychologist and publisher Christine L'Heureux and illustrator Hélène Desputeaux, Caillou debuted as an infant in a series of books running from 1989 onwards, and is also the mascot of the Chouette Publishing company, which was founded by L'Heureux. Caillou's unique trait is the fact that he is completely bald. This decision was made after his creators began to age the character in the hopes of keeping Caillou recognizable and promoting diversity. Caillou is shown to be a caring, adventurous, helpful, imaginative 4-year old child. Overall he constantly asks questions about the world around him and

characters.name: Clementine
characters.description: ClementineBackground informationFirst appearance(s)Caillou At DaycareLast appearance(s)You're Not Miss Martin!Television programsCaillouCharacter informationPersonalitySweet, kind, nice, understanding, sensitive, imaginative, bossy (at times)OccupationStudentAlignmentGoodSpeciesAfricanGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanAge(s)4AlliesCaillouLeoSource Leo Clementineis one of Caillou's best friends. Along withLeo, she also appears to be good friends withEmma. She first appeared in the first-season episode "Caillou at Daycare". In this episode she was nice to Caillou and showed him the art supplies in the classroom. She can be a bit bossy at times, but overall she is nice and understanding. InCaillou's Holiday Movie, she celebrates Kwanzaa. She has an older brother namedBilly. Clementine also has a crush on Caillou. She was voiced by Brigid Tierney, then Sophie Uretsky, and currently voiced by Markeda McKay in theCaillou (2024)reboot.

characters.name: Daddy
characters.description: BorisBackground informationVoicePat FryCharacter informationPersonalityFriendly, calm, a bit neglectful and permissive as a parent at times, supportive, caring, loving, funny, niceOccupationunnamed office jobHomeQuebec, CanadaSpeciesCaucasianGenderMaleSpeciesHumanAge(s)31RelativesUncle Felix(brother-in-law)Unknown father-in-lawUnknown mother-in-lawSpouse(s)Doris(wife)Partner(s)Doris(wife)ChildrenCaillou(son)Rosie(daughter)ParentsGrandma(mother)Grandpa(father)SiblingsUnnamed sisterPet(s)GilbertAlliesDorisSara's momLeo's momClementine's momMr. Hinkle's sisterMrs. MartinLikesPlaying with Caillou and RosieDislikesHis children misbehavingQuoteCome on, Sport!Source Sara's momLeo's momClementine's momMr. Hinkle's sisterMrs. Martin Boris, also known asDaddyis the father ofCaillouandRosie, the husband ofDoris, and the son ofGrandmaandGrandpa. He is voiced by Pat Fry in the original series, by Mike Pollock in Caillou: the New Adventures, and Tyrone Savage in the 2023 reboot. Boris is a nice father to both of his kids and often teaches them new things.

characters.name: Daniel
characters.description: Daniel Danielis an older kid friend ofCaillou. He has somewhat longish brown hair and is normally seen wearing a red shirt with a green undershirt and blue jeans. In "The Spider Issue," Daniel shares with Caillou a comic about a "mutant spider from cosmic space," but this causes Caillou to become afraid of spiders. In "Caillou Roller Skates," Caillou meets Daniel at the park trying out a new pair of inline skates. He tells Caillou that he got good at skating by practicing a lot and helps him to practice.

characters.name: Daniel

In "Caillou Roller Skates," Caillou meets Daniel at the park trying out a new pair of inline skates. He tells Caillou that he got good at skating by practicing a lot and helps him to practice.

characters.name: Dee-Dee
characters.description: Dee-Deeis a brown squirrel and the 4th puppet who appears in thePuppet segmentsin season two. She doesn't appear in all of them likeGilbert,RexyandTeddy, but is still considered a main character by the producers of the show. Dee-Dee lives in the tree inCaillou's backyard and is often seen playing with Rexy, but sometimes interacts with Teddy and Gilbert. Dee-Dee first appeared in a puppet segment when she was a baby squirrel lost from her family when Rexy found her. Dee-Dee does have some family, which she mentions she is having a family reunion with once. Dee Dee did not appear in the third season puppet segments; she wasn't even mentioned, though the hole in her tree remained; this was never explained, though it is likely she moved.

characters.name: Derek
characters.description: InCaillou Stays Up Late, aManis shown attending the party held by Caillou's parents. the man's name is Derek. And he is Jewish-Canadian.

characters.name: Emma
characters.description: Emmais a girl inCaillou's preschool class. She andXavierare the newest major characters on the show, both appearing at the beginning of season 3. However, they both appear briefly in the episode "Caillou at Daycare". Caillou doesn't know Emma and Xavier that well compared to the other kids in his preschool class.  She has a father as seen in "Captain Caillou" and "Raspberry Ruckus". She has a cat as mentioned in "Glitter Glitch". She has Type 1 diabetes as revealed in "Emma's Extra Snacks." She is voiced by futureDegrassiactress Jamie Bloch. Emma has medium-length black hair styled into pigtails. She wears a red hat, a creamy coloured long sleeved shirt with a white pony printed on it, red pants, white socks and dark blue shoes. She also sometimes wears a red sweater. Caillou's Preschool class

characters.name: Gilbert
characters.description: GilbertGilbertBackground informationFirst appearance(s)Caillou Makes CookiesLast appearance(s)?Books?Magazines?Voice?Inspiration?Character informationFull nameGilbert the CatPersonality?AppearanceA gray cat with black stripes, a blue spot on his eye, and an orange collarOccupationPetAlignmentGoodHomeHouse of CaillouSpeciesMascotGenderMaleSpeciesCatRelativesCaillouOwner(s)CaillouAlliesTeddyRexyEnemiesNeighborhood dogLikes?Dislikes?Powers and abilities?StatusAliveQuote?SourceGilbertis the pet cat ofCaillouand his family. He's one of the most reoccurring characters in the series, with him making appearances since the first season. He also makes appearances in thePuppet Segments, along withRexyandTeddy, where he is shown speaking, unlike the animate segments. Rexy He has grey fur (with black stripes on his back and belly), a blue spot on the right of this head, a red nose, and an orange collar (that has a tag in Season four and five).

characters.name: Grandma
characters.description: GrandmaBackground informationFirst appearance(s)Caillou Hates VegetablesLast appearance(s)Soccer TroubleFeature filmsCaillou's Holiday MovieVoicePauline LittleCharacter informationGenderFemaleAge(s)Unknown (old age) Presumaby 50s-60sRelativesGrandpa(husband)Boris(son)Doris(daughter-in-law)Caillou(grandson)Rosie(granddaughter)Unnamed DaughterUncle Felix(son-in-law)LikesArts, crafts, dancing, cooking, gardeningDislikesBeetsSourceGrandmais the paternal grandmother ofCaillouandRosie, the wife ofGrandpa, the mother ofBorisand his sister and the mother-in-law ofDorisandUncle Felix. She has made appearances in the show since Season 1. Grandma does many different activities, such as doing art. She’s shown to have an art room. In several episodes, such asCaillou's Colors, she’s seen painting. She also likes to cook and make desserts. InCaillou Goes Birdwatching, it's revealed she likes to go birdwatching and invites Caillou on her trips. In episodes such asCaillou's Got RhythmandDancing at Grandma's, she’s shown to have a piano. She helps Caillou andRosielearn new things, just likeDorisandBoris. In Season 4 and 5, she andGrandpaare shown babysitting Caillou and Rosie instead ofJulie.

characters.name: Grandpa
characters.description: GrandpaBackground informationFirst appearance(s)Caillou Hates VegetablesLast appearance(s)Soccer Trouble (Original series)Character informationFull nameGrandpaOther namesGrandpa (Caillou and Rosie)Dad (Boris)Kid (George)OccupationGrandparent /RetiredGenderMaleSpeciesHumanAge(s)60RelativesGrandma(wife)Doris(daughter-in-law)Boris(son)Caillou(grandson)Rosie(granddaughter)Unnamed daughterUncle Felix(son-in-law)ChildrenBorisAlliesGeorgeSeamusSource GrandpaisCaillouandRosie's paternal grandfather, the husband ofGrandma, the father ofBoris, and his sister the father-in-law ofDoris,Uncle FelixandAunt Ana. He first appears inCaillou Hates Vegetables. He often tells Caillou stories about his Daddy when he was little like Caillou. InCaillou's Hiding Place, he shows Caillou a fort hidden in a tree in the backyard that Daddy used to play in. In the episodeSurprise Party, Caillou along withGrandmaandRosieplan a surprise birthday party for Grandpa after finding out he didn't have a birthday party.

characters.name: Isabell
characters.description: Isabelis one ofCaillou's friends and also one of his neighbors. Isabel speaks both English and Spanish. She appeared ina video uploaded by Caillou's official YouTube channel, which is based off of the book "Caillou Meets a Princess" where Isabel debuted.

characters.name: Jason
characters.description: Jason  is a 4 year old who is one ofCaillou's friends. He has a twin brother namedJeffery. Jason and Jeffery first appeared in Season 2 in the episodeNew House, New Neighbors. In the episodeCaillou the chef, Jason has a toy spider named Boris. By Season 4, he and Jeffery began coming to Caillou's preschool class. In Seasons 2 and 3, he and Jeffery appear to be mischievous and sometimes a little mean to Caillou but, in Season 4, they are nicer to Caillou and more of kind people. He and Jeffrey are both voiced by Camden Angelis. Like Jeffery, Jason looked more identical and has a brown skin colour. First, he and Jeffery both wore similar clothes (red shirts with a white stripe and pants) but, in Season 4, Jason began to wear a white shirt with a red stripe and they are now able to be told apart. He has a Spanish accent.
